units.title: Quantum Technology, Edge and Cloud Computing and Advanced VLSI and Semiconductor

topics.topic: Quantum Technology, Edge and Cloud Computing and Advanced VLSI and Semiconductor Technologies Quantum Technology: Define Quantum Technology -Difference between classical and quantum technologies-Why quantum is important for the future -Define Qubit and Superposition referred to Quantum Technology-Define Quantum Entanglement- State the concept of Quantum Cryptography and Quantum Key Distribution (QKD)-State the concept of Quantum Sensors -State the concept of Quantum Teleportation-List the applications of Quantum Technology Edge and Cloud Computing: Define edge computing and state its need -Define cloud computing -List the differences between cloud computing and edge computing -List the applications of cloud computing-List the applications of edge computing. Advanced VLSI and Semiconductor Technologies: Define FinFET and state the applications of FinFET-Define Gate-All-Around FETs (GAAFETs) and state the applications of GAAFETs -State the importance and applications of Silicon -on-Insulator (SOI) Technology -State the need for Carbon Nanotube FETs (CNTFETs) and List their applications -State the need for Wide Bandgap Semiconductors and List their applications. 3. Industrial Internet of Things (IIOT) Define IIoT and how it differs from regular IoT -List the Key components of IIOT - List the important communication Protocols in IIoT-List the security challenges in IIoT-List the Applications IIoT
